channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Scientists Discover World's Largest Whale Graveyard With Bones Over 5 Million Years Old

media:content.media:description: The largest modern carcass found was that of a five-metre-long Antarctic minke whale.

item.description: Some of the fossils recovered from the site date back as far as 5.3 million years, making it the oldest known whale graveyard ever documented.
item.content:encoded: Some of the fossils recovered from the site date back as far as 5.3 million years, making it the oldest known whale graveyard ever documented.

item.title: 2 Days After 30 Deaths, 16 Killed As Forces Open Fire On Protesters In PoK

media:content.media:description: The demonstration soon turned violent with the Pak army unleashing gunfire on the crowd

item.description: 2 Days After 30 Deaths, 16 Killed As Forces Open Fire On Protesters In PoK
item.content:encoded: 2 Days After 30 Deaths, 16 Killed As Forces Open Fire On Protesters In PoK

item.title: Man Finds 16th-Century Diamond Ring Worth Rs 19 Lakh With Metal Detector

media:content.media:description: The ring is expected to attract bids of between £15,000 (roughly Rs 19 lakh).

item.description: The ring is expected to attract bids of between £15,000 and £20,000.
item.content:encoded: The ring is expected to attract bids of between £15,000 and £20,000.

item.title: Indians In UK Living In 'Fear' After 'Racist' Arson Attacks In Belfast

media:content.media:description: Firefighters rescued several people from burning houses

item.description: Videos on social media showed a crowd of protesters hurling objects toward police vehicles, and officers responding by firing water cannons at them.
item.content:encoded: Videos on social media showed a crowd of protesters hurling objects toward police vehicles, and officers responding by firing water cannons at them.

item.title: Elon Musk's XAI Accused Of Illegally Firing Engineer Who Raised Safety Concerns
item.description: The lawsuit comes ahead of SpaceX's planned initial public offering, the largest ever, on Friday.
item.content:encoded: The lawsuit comes ahead of SpaceX's planned initial public offering, the largest ever, on Friday.

item.title: Third Ship With Indian Sailors On Fire Near Oman

media:content.media:description: MT Jalveer is the third ship with an Indian crew to come under attack near Oman in recent days

item.description: The incident was confirmed by the Indian Embassy in Oman, which said it was closely monitoring the situation and coordinating with the local authorities for further details.
item.content:encoded: The incident was confirmed by the Indian Embassy in Oman, which said it was closely monitoring the situation and coordinating with the local authorities for further details.

item.title: "Stay Safe": UK Cops Warn Of Unrest In Belfast Over "Hit List" Of Migrants
item.description: Police warned that those creating or sharing the list could be committing a criminal offence and deployed 200 additional officers to help prevent further violence.
item.content:encoded: Police warned that those creating or sharing the list could be committing a criminal offence and deployed 200 additional officers to help prevent further violence.

item.title: 3 Indian Sailors Killed In US Attack On Ship Off Oman Coast
item.description: 3 Indian Sailors Killed In US Attack On Ship Off Oman Coast: Union Minister Sarbananda Sonowal
item.content:encoded: 3 Indian Sailors Killed In US Attack On Ship Off Oman Coast: Union Minister Sarbananda Sonowal

item.title: US-Iran War Live: Iran Attacks Bahrain, Kuwait, Jordan After 2nd Round Of US Strikes

media:content.media:description: US Israel Iran War LIVE Updates

item.description: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates:
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates:

item.title: Video Captures Moment When US Struck Tanker Carrying Indian Crew

media:content.media:description: The International Maritime Organization (IMO) also condemned the attack on tanker near Strait of Hormuz

item.description: A missile tore through the engine room of the oil tanker Settebello, setting off a fire onboard. The Palau-flagged vessel was sailing 20 nautical miles northeast of Omani port of Sohar when the incident occurred.
item.content:encoded: A missile tore through the engine room of the oil tanker Settebello, setting off a fire onboard. The Palau-flagged vessel was sailing 20 nautical miles northeast of Omani port of Sohar when the incident occurred.

item.title: Antonio Gracias: Elon Musk's Friend Set To Be Billionaire After SpaceX IPO

media:content.media:description: Antonio Gracias and Elon Musk met through PayPal connections in the early 2000s

item.description: Antonio Gracias, one of Musk's closest business allies, is set for a major payday as SpaceX heads to the public markets.
item.content:encoded: Antonio Gracias, one of Musk's closest business allies, is set for a major payday as SpaceX heads to the public markets.

item.title: Princess Diana's "Why Did God Invent Sex" Letter To Actor Terence Stamp Among Items To Go On Sale

media:content.media:description: Diana also invited Stamp for lunch in December 1991

item.description: Auctioneers expect each letter to sell for between £500 and £2,000 (about Rs 64,000 to Rs 2,55,000).
item.content:encoded: Auctioneers expect each letter to sell for between £500 and £2,000 (about Rs 64,000 to Rs 2,55,000).

item.title: Indian-Origin Financier Mahender Makhijani Used Sex Parties To Defraud US Bank Of $100 Million

media:content.media:description: The man is also accused of using supposed strong-arm tactics

item.description: According to the US Internal Revenue Service (IRS), Makhijani falsified title insurance records, concealed true lien positions, and used a network of shell companies to mislead a federally insured bank.
item.content:encoded: According to the US Internal Revenue Service (IRS), Makhijani falsified title insurance records, concealed true lien positions, and used a network of shell companies to mislead a federally insured bank.

item.title: Who Is Mahender Makhijani? Indian-Origin Financier Accused Of Defrauding US Bank Of $100 Million, Hosting Sex Parties

media:content.media:description: Mahender Makhijani was charged with bank fraud, which carries a maximum 30-year prison term.

item.description: California businessman Mahender Makhijani has been arrested by federal agents on charges of bank fraud, following allegations that he defrauded a US bank of nearly $100 million.
item.content:encoded: California businessman Mahender Makhijani has been arrested by federal agents on charges of bank fraud, following allegations that he defrauded a US bank of nearly $100 million.

item.title: FBI Seizes 13 Websites Used By China To Target US Workers With Sensitive Information

media:content.media:description: The companies were all fakes and the job postings were a sham (Representational Image)

item.description: The 13 websites purported to be affiliated with consulting companies that advertised job openings for current and former holders of security clearances.
item.content:encoded: The 13 websites purported to be affiliated with consulting companies that advertised job openings for current and former holders of security clearances.

item.title: 'Iran Unaware': Trump Says US Sneaked 100 Million Oil Barrels From Hormuz

media:content.media:description: US began a military operation, dubbed Project Freedom, to escort ships through Hormuz in early May.

item.description: The narrow waterway connecting the Gulf of Persia to Arabia has been under Iran's chokehold in retaliation for the US and Israeli attacks. One-fifth of the global oil passes through the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: The narrow waterway connecting the Gulf of Persia to Arabia has been under Iran's chokehold in retaliation for the US and Israeli attacks. One-fifth of the global oil passes through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Bill Gates Says Jeffrey Epstein Tried To Use His Extramarital Affairs To Pressure Him

media:content.media:description: Bill Gates was seen with two women at the Epstein estate

item.description: In his statement, Gates reiterated that he deeply regretted his association with Epstein.
item.content:encoded: In his statement, Gates reiterated that he deeply regretted his association with Epstein.

item.title: "Going To Hit Them Hard Again Today": Trump's Fresh Threat To Iran

media:content.media:description: "We were really close to a deal but they keep tapping us along," Trump said.

item.description: "Going To Hit Them Again Hard Today": Trump's Fresh Threat To Iran
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1111446/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>"Going To Hit Them Again Hard Today": Trump's Fresh Threat To Iran

item.title: It's Raining Missiles Over Gulf. US, Iran Back In War Mode

media:content.media:description: CENTCOM has flagged that the Iranian claim of the Strait of Hormuz being closed was false

item.description: In response, Iran's IRGC said that its aerospace force and navy have carried out a two-wave operational strike against US forces in the region
item.content:encoded: In response, Iran's IRGC said that its aerospace force and navy have carried out a two-wave operational strike against US forces in the region

item.title: Video: 2 Key Iran Water Reservoirs Attacked By US, Supply Hit For 20,000 Homes

media:content.media:description: Iran claimed that the two reservoirs were destroyed in US strikes

item.description: The US carried out late-night strikes on Iran's Sirik after claiming that Iran downed an Army Apache helicopter off the coast of Oman.
item.content:encoded: The US carried out late-night strikes on Iran's Sirik after claiming that Iran downed an Army Apache helicopter off the coast of Oman.
